original_prompt:
You are a principal engineer. Read the entire current state of WordPulse codebase. Analyze deeply, then spawn as many parallel subagents as needed to fix everything important. Each subagent commits and pushes independently.

Decide yourself what roles are needed. Focus on:
- Anything still broken or missing
- Content quality (are news actually loading? images showing? translation working?)
- Performance on real users
- Anything that would make this a genuinely impressive project

No tests. No...
